programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is a wonderful day; after experiencing a health scare, they realize it is time to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Daren and Naana are searching for a turn-key home with an ocean view; they need a location to open their dream roadside ice cream shop.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Frankie and Jacques love entertaining friends and family for game nights; they are looking for a home on the water, where they can jump off a dock and into the lake after a competitive game or two.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Derek and Joanne are looking to move from a golf course to a waterfront property; their house search takes them to various properties; the first one that is built into a huge boulder and the second that's build on top of natural granite.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Calvin and Justin love the water and even own a boat, but they don't yet own a lakefront home where they can park it; their property search takes them to an entertainer's dream home, which is a resort-like retreat with two separate living spaces.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Dave and Maxine want a spacious lakefront retreat for their family; they tour a modern-rustic home with concrete floors, a nautical-inspired riverfront escape, and a sleek rustic build with a sunken living room and stunning lake views.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Tina and Tony are searching for the perfect lakefront estate to host their large Italian family; they visit a stunning entertainer's paradise, a sprawling 4,300 sq. ft. home with an amazing outdoor living space, and a sleek, modern canal-side home.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Musicians Basil and Belinda seek the perfect lakefront party house; they explore a rustic 6-bedroom retreat with a private beach, a 4-bedroom stunner with a saltwater pool and rooftop deck, and a sleek modern home with a spa-like ensuite and sandy shoreline; which home will hit the right note?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Empty nesters Alex and Cheryl are searching for their forever lakefront home. Options include a 13-acre estate with a private beach, a traditionally styled retreat with a wine cellar and European-inspired outdoor spaces, and a modern escape with seamless indoor-outdoor living. Which dream home will they choose?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Sustainable farmers Alain and Sara want a lakefront home that fits their eco-friendly lifestyle; they tour a Florida-style bungalow ideal for beekeeping, a traditional home with a private lake and farm space, and a modern retreat.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Julia and Matteo want a vacation home with a top-tier kitchen for Italian feasts and space for classic cars; they tour a Mediterranean-inspired retreat with a waterfront kitchen, a nautical-themed escape with a loft and bar, and a sleek, modern build with forest views; which home will they choose?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jessica and Zack are ready to trade their beachfront home for a lakefront dream; they explore an 8,000-square-foot French-inspired estate, a 7,000-square-foot home with an ice rink, and a charming, elegant retreat with a sandy beach.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Eric and Lisa are ready to turn their vision board into reality with a dream lakefront property; from ultra-modern luxury to rustic charm, their options promise sweeping views, show-stopping kitchens, and stunning outdoor features.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Andrea and Ted are trading mountain views for lakeside living as they search for the perfect home for their growing family; from sleek modern architecture to charming traditional retreats, the possibilities are as varied as their vision; which dream home will win their hearts?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jason and Michael are trading in two homes for one dream lakefront estate; with their dogs and future entertaining in mind, they tour three spectacular properties featuring gourmet kitchens, stunning great rooms, and incredible outdoor spaces; which lakeside retreat will become their forever home?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Newlyweds Antoinette and Levin are seeking a stunning lakefront property to become their family's forever home. Will it be modern luxury, vintage charm, or timeless elegance that wins their hearts?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Retired boat-dwellers Asim and Sheila are ready to anchor down on land; as they tour elegant homes with stunning kitchens, timber ceilings, and waterfront decks, they're searching for the perfect place to settle; which lakefront gem will win their hearts?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Tage and Vivian are seeking a spacious lakefront haven for their growing family; touring elegant properties with gourmet kitchens, grand fireplaces, and lush outdoor terraces, they're ready to pick their perfect retirement retreat.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Julia and Matteo want a vacation home with a top-tier kitchen for Italian feasts and space for classic cars; they tour a Mediterranean-inspired retreat with a waterfront kitchen, a nautical-themed escape with a loft and bar, and a sleek, modern build with forest views; which home will they choose?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jessica and Zack are ready to trade their beachfront home for a lakefront dream; they explore an 8,000-square-foot French-inspired estate, a 7,000-square-foot home with an ice rink, and a charming, elegant retreat with a sandy beach.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Eric and Lisa are ready to turn their vision board into reality with a dream lakefront property; from ultra-modern luxury to rustic charm, their options promise sweeping views, show-stopping kitchens, and stunning outdoor features.

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Andrea and Ted are trading mountain views for lakeside living as they search for the perfect home for their growing family; from sleek modern architecture to charming traditional retreats, the possibilities are as varied as their vision; which dream home will win their hearts?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Jason and Michael are trading in two homes for one dream lakefront estate; with their dogs and future entertaining in mind, they tour three spectacular properties featuring gourmet kitchens, stunning great rooms, and incredible outdoor spaces; which lakeside retreat will become their forever home?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Newlyweds Antoinette and Levin are seeking a stunning lakefront property to become their family's forever home. Will it be modern luxury, vintage charm, or timeless elegance that wins their hearts?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Retired boat-dwellers Asim and Sheila are ready to anchor down on land; as they tour elegant homes with stunning kitchens, timber ceilings, and waterfront decks, they're searching for the perfect place to settle; which lakefront gem will win their hearts?

programme.title: Lakefront Luxury
programme.desc: Tage and Vivian are seeking a spacious lakefront haven for their growing family; touring elegant properties with gourmet kitchens, grand fireplaces, and lush outdoor terraces, they're ready to pick their perfect retirement retreat.

programme.desc: Frankie and Jacques love entertaining friends and family for game nights; they are looking for a home on the water, where they can jump off a dock and into the lake after a competitive game or two.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has a customer who is looking to restore a 1942 Ford truck that saw some action in WWII; Roli and Ryan look at a '71 Duster; Danny gets a 1974 Bronco that isn't all he thought it would be.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The shop is restoring a 1942 Ford truck; Danny and Ryan look at a 1929 Ford Roadster; Gary pulls one over on Mike in the paint shop; Danny finds a Corvette and Firebird that might be for sale.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Mike buys a Smart car and wants to trick it out at the shop; Danny's pal Shane wants to show Danny his new 1955 Chevy; a special project that will take Danny back to when he first got into cars.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Big Twin
programme.desc: Ryan is working on a secret project for chopper shop Bones Legacy, while a Chevy Impala that redefines lowrider blinds Mike and Roli; Danny looks into a Satellite Sebring, but has a hard time making a deal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin's brother would like to sell Danny a 1969 Cadillac, but they can't let Kevin know or else he'll never trust his brother or Danny again; Danny wants to purchase a 1936 Ford Humpback when he's supposed to be shopping for a Rolls-Royce.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: A returning customer requires Danny's help restoring a 1971 Road Runner to give as a celebratory gift to his wife and step-daughter; Mike and Roli settle a debt by gloving up and taking it to the mat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny lands a pimp-tastic 1967 Impala, but when it's time to hand the keys over to an important client Danny doesn't think he can let her go; an old friend shows Danny a 1914 Ford that's headed to the Smithsonian.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has plans for a 1972 Cutlass he hopes to flip; Roli looks for help from the guys to learn to do a burn-out; Danny examines a 1971 Torino whose owner can't seem to put a price on it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM; this coin boasts a minuscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: 1776 Gold Rare Coin
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: 1776 Gold Rare Coin
programme.desc: Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of American Freedom with this Gold 1776-2026 American Gold Eagle graded PF70UCAM. Encapsulated in a 1 of 250 40th Anniversary holder with the First Day of Issue designation, this is a once in a lifetime American coin!

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Inspired by the Rat Rods at a local shop, Danny sends the guys out to locate parts for a Count's Kustoms Rat Rod; while on the hunt, Danny gets preoccupied by a beauty of a Bel Air and finds himself on the other side of the bargaining table.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Kevin and the team get together to make something special for Danny; Danny runs into an old pal and his 1959 Corvette gasser.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has to give up his prized 1972 Monte Carlo for one of his biggest clients, and is counting on his team finish the job done in one week; Ryan and Mike go for the ride of their lives in a 1965 Fastback Mustang.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny sunk a lot of time into a 1967 Ford Bronco, but to make any profit, the shop will have to turn it around quickly; a customer brings in a 1950 Harley Davidson; Danny gets a chance to go for a spin in a 1966 Corvette Sting Ray.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has a customer ready to buy the 1967 Ford Bronco he's restoring; Mike and Roli settle a score at a gun range; Danny checks out a 1980 fire truck that was a first responder at the tragic Las Vegas MGM fire.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is asked to make a commemorative bike that honors music legend Les Paul; Mike wants to impress Danny and checks out a 1940 Dodge that's for sale; Danny and Kevin look at a 1964 Galaxie.
